creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
Ports that use NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES fail to build

Fix: 

Some bsd.port.mk file black magic. This wasn't in 4.0-RELEASE.
How-To-Repeat: 
        cd /usr/ports/audio/wmmixer; make install
        cd /usr/ports/x11-clocks/wmtime; make install
        cd /usr/ports/net/vnc; make install
